item.title: Update on Claude Fable 5 in Devin
item.description: Claude Fable 5 is now available in Devin Cloud’s Ultra agent, Devin Desktop, and Devin CLI.

item.title: Agentic MapReduce
item.description: A new architecture from Cognition for scaling full-codebase reasoning with distributed agents

item.title: Evaluating Security Swarm
item.description: How we built an eval of real, recent vulnerabilities to measure Security Swarm — and why it finds more bugs at lower cost than any tool we tested.

item.title: Claude Sonnet 5 is now available in Devin
item.description: Claude Sonnet 5 is now live in Devin Desktop and Devin CLI. It pairs frontier-level coding performance with a more affordable price point, using roughly 30% less quota than Claude Sonnet 4.6 through August 31, 2026.

item.title: Kimi K2.7 and GLM 5.2 Now Available in Devin Desktop and CLI
item.description: Kimi K2.7 and GLM 5.2 are now available in Devin Desktop and CLI. Both models deliver strong FrontierCode Extended scores and won't consume quota for Pro, Max, and Teams plans until July 5.

item.title: Introducing Security in Devin Review
item.description: Every pull request in Devin Review now gets a security review. Devin catches auth bypasses and logic flaws that pattern-matching scanners miss, with full remediation from finding to fix.

item.title: Windsurf is now Devin Desktop. The IDE you love, with more features. Learn more →Windsurf is now Devin Desktop →
